caption: A video clip captures gameplay from a football simulation. In the initial scene, players in black and white uniforms compete on a green turf field under stadium lights, with an interface at the top displaying "1st & 10" and "SUPER BOWL CH." A man wearing a headset and a blue shirt is visible in a small inset window in the bottom left. As the scene progresses, the gameplay pauses and transitions to a play-selection menu. The menu includes options such as "SELECT A PLAY," "COACH SUGGESTIONS," and "HOLD THE LINE," while a "PREVIOUS PLAY" window shows a replay of a previous action. The man in the inset window remains visible, reacting to the screen. The interface continues to show game stats, including "3rd" down, a clock at "0:32," and "14" points. By the end, the menu options shift to show a play called "HB ISO" and "Z SPOT."
